question: What was total revenue in 2024?
sql: SELECT SUM(f.LineTotal) AS TotalRevenue FROM gold.FactOrderItem f JOIN gold.DimDate d ON d.DateKey = f.DateKey WHERE d.[Year] = 2024;

question: Top 5 best-selling products by quantity
sql: SELECT TOP 5 p.ProductName, SUM(f.Quantity) AS UnitsSold FROM gold.FactOrderItem f JOIN gold.DimProduct p ON p.ProductKey = f.ProductKey GROUP BY p.ProductName ORDER BY UnitsSold DESC;

question: Doanh thu theo thành phố trong năm 2025
sql: SELECT s.City, SUM(f.LineTotal) AS Revenue FROM gold.FactOrderItem f JOIN gold.DimStore s ON s.StoreKey = f.StoreKey JOIN gold.DimDate d ON d.DateKey = f.DateKey WHERE d.[Year] = 2025 GROUP BY s.City;

question: How many orders were placed in 2025?
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT f.OrderId) AS OrderCount FROM gold.FactOrderItem f JOIN gold.DimDate d ON d.DateKey = f.DateKey WHERE d.[Year] = 2025;

question: Revenue by payment method
sql: SELECT f.PaymentMethod, SUM(f.LineTotal) AS Revenue FROM gold.FactOrderItem f GROUP BY f.PaymentMethod;

question: Revenue by membership tier in 2024
sql: SELECT c.MembershipTier, SUM(f.LineTotal) AS Revenue FROM gold.FactOrderItem f JOIN gold.DimCustomer c ON c.CustomerKey = f.CustomerKey JOIN gold.DimDate d ON d.DateKey = f.DateKey WHERE d.[Year] = 2024 GROUP BY c.MembershipTier;

question: Monthly revenue in 2025
sql: SELECT d.MonthNum, d.MonthName, SUM(f.LineTotal) AS Revenue FROM gold.FactOrderItem f JOIN gold.DimDate d ON d.DateKey = f.DateKey WHERE d.[Year] = 2025 GROUP BY d.MonthNum, d.MonthName;

question: Top 3 stores by revenue
sql: SELECT TOP 3 s.StoreName, SUM(f.LineTotal) AS Revenue FROM gold.FactOrderItem f JOIN gold.DimStore s ON s.StoreKey = f.StoreKey GROUP BY s.StoreName ORDER BY Revenue DESC;
